history.created_by: RUN |4 EXPECTED_LANGUAGE=cpp EXPECTED_TOOL_VERSION=14.2.0 BASE_IMAGE_REFERENCE=alpine:3.22@sha256:7c8cb692ae09657cbc4a3f3cbd0e8d5a2690ba38386aaaf252dbb060bf5eb2e6 RUNTIME_PACKAGES=g++=14.2.0-r6 musl-dev=1.2.5-r12 /bin/sh -c set -eu;     if [ -n "${RUNTIME_PACKAGES}" ]; then apk add --no-cache ${RUNTIME_PACKAGES}; fi;     mkdir -p /usr/local/bin;     case "${EXPECTED_LANGUAGE}" in       c)         ln -s /usr/bin/gcc /usr/local/bin/gcc;         test "$(/usr/local/bin/gcc -dumpfullversion)" = "${EXPECTED_TOOL_VERSION}"         ;;       cpp)         ln -s /usr/bin/g++ /usr/local/bin/g++;         test "$(/usr/local/bin/g++ -dumpfullversion)" = "${EXPECTED_TOOL_VERSION}"         ;;       java)         mkdir -p /opt/java;         ln -s /usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk /opt/java/openjdk;         /opt/java/openjdk/bin/java -XshowSettings:properties -version 2>&1           | grep -F "java.version = ${EXPECTED_TOOL_VERSION}" >/dev/null         ;;       python)         rm -rf /usr/local/lib/python3.14/ensurepip           /usr/local/lib/python3.14/site-packages/pip           /usr/local/lib/python3.14/site-packages/pip-*.dist-info;         rm -f /usr/local/bin/pip /usr/local/bin/pip3 /usr/local/bin/pip3.14;         ! command -v pip >/dev/null 2>&1;         ! /usr/local/bin/python3 -m ensurepip --version >/dev/null 2>&1;         test "$(/usr/local/bin/python3 -c 'import platform; print(platform.python_version())')" = "${EXPECTED_TOOL_VERSION}"         ;;       javascript)         rm -rf /usr/local/lib/node_modules /opt/yarn-v*;         rm -f /usr/local/bin/npm /usr/local/bin/npx /usr/local/bin/corepack           /usr/local/bin/yarn /usr/local/bin/yarnpkg;         test "$(/usr/local/bin/node --version)" = "v${EXPECTED_TOOL_VERSION}"         ;;       *) exit 64 ;;     esac;     rm -f /sbin/apk # buildkit

LABEL org.opencontainers.image.title=LearnCoding cpp runtime org.opencontainers.image.description=Networkless, non-root learner-code runtime with fixed native harness org.opencontainers.image.vendor=LearnCoding org.opencontainers.image.licenses=AGPL-3.0-or-later io.learncoding.runner.protocol=1 io.learncoding.runner.language=cpp io.learncoding.runner.base=alpine:3.22@sha256:7c8cb692ae09657cbc4a3f3cbd0e8d5a2690ba38386aaaf252dbb060bf5eb2e6 io.learncoding.runner.packages=g++=14.2.0-r6 musl-dev=1.2.5-r12
